div.inline-title.background: rgb(16, 16, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(16, 16, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(0, 102, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
